Tyler S. Smith

// software engineer · builder · problem solver

I build software that works and websites that sell. Every project architected from scratch, never from a template.

Currently accepting new projects - let's build something together.
Start a Conversation

Six client projects shipped in the last year alone - from a five-page brochure site for a dental practice to a multi-vendor marketplace with Stripe Connect payments and a 22-week technical roadmap. Each one scoped, built, and deployed by one person.

I also build my own products. LedgerFortress is a rental property ledger designed to beat cloud-dependent competitors by keeping data local. Play Lore is a full interactive story engine with persistent NPC memory, convergence mechanics, and PDF export. On the consulting side, I run SEO audits that have uncovered broken schemas, staging domain leaks, and invisible local search gaps for clients in biotech, real estate, and e-commerce.

I don't do hourly. I quote the project, deliver below agency rates, and move at a pace that makes teams of five look slow.

What I Build

Website Builds

From brochure sites for local businesses to full-stack custom platforms with payment processing, auth, and admin dashboards. No templates - every build is from scratch.

Custom Software

Purpose-built applications designed to solve specific business problems. Architecture, UI, deployment - soup to nuts. Built to scale, priced to compete.

SEO & Discoverability

Professional audits covering meta, schema markup, heading hierarchy, local search gaps, and discoverability. Delivered as a branded assessment document.

Feasibility Studies

Competitive analysis, architecture recommendations, cost breakdowns, risk assessments, and technical roadmaps. Know what you're building before you build it.

Monthly Retainers

Content, SEO updates, site maintenance, performance reporting, and Google Business Profile management. Ongoing support that keeps things running.

Product Development

Full product builds with advanced integrations - payment infrastructure, real-time systems, intelligent features. From concept through launch.

Small Business Software · Desktop Application

LedgerFortress

A rental property ledger built for multi-unit landlords who want their books kept locally - no cloud dependency, no subscription traps. Full dashboard with property tracking, tenant management, lease handling, work orders, reconciliation, and custom reporting. Designed to outperform tools like TenantFile by putting the owner in control of their own data.

React Local Storage Vite Tailwind Electron
Dashboard showing properties, units, cash flow, vacancy rate, and recent activity - all stored locally on the landlord's machine.
Full sidebar navigation: Owners, Properties, Units, Tenants, Leases, Ledger, Balances, Reconciliation, Work Orders, Notices, Reminders, Forms.
v6.1.0 - "Your properties. Your data. Your hard drive."
Request a Demo

Interested in something similar? Let's talk.

Interactive Story Engine · SaaS · PWA

Play Lore

What if interactive fiction actually read like a novel? Play Lore is a full story engine where every character remembers, every world breathes, and every story finds its end. Seven genres - Dark Fantasy, Isekai, Murim, Mystery, Romance, Sci-Fi, Western - each with persistent NPC memory, convergence mechanics, and prose that doesn't read like a chatbot.

React Supabase Vercel Stripe Claude API PWA
Genre selection - each world has its own tone, memory system, and narrative rules. NPCs remember past interactions across sessions.
Stories auto-save. Memory never fades. Every ending is earned.
Save/load, PDF export, shareable story links, full PWA with offline support.
Visit LorePlayAI.ai @LorePlayAI

Want to build something with this kind of depth? Let's talk.

Client Website

Warden Rentals

A lakeside vacation rental site for two communities on Grand Lake - Warden Estates and Smitty's Resort. Built with full-bleed hero photography, a dual-community selector, individual property listings, RV and boat slip rental pages, FAQ, and contact forms. Designed to convert visitors into bookings with clear calls to action and seasonal availability.

HTML CSS Responsive SEO
Dual-community architecture - visitors choose between Warden Estates and Smitty's Resort, each with its own listings and character.
Full-bleed hero photography, mobile-responsive layout, and integrated contact forms for booking inquiries.
Visit WardenRentals.com

Need a site like this for your rental property? Let's talk.

Client Website - Full Redesign

Pumpin' Spice Decor

A seasonal porch decor and installation service in the San Francisco Bay Area. The original site was built on a basic template with inconsistent styling, a cluttered layout, and no clear conversion path. Redesigned with refined branding, streamlined packages, and a modern responsive build.

HTML Tailwind Responsive Social Embedding
Before
After
Template layout replaced with branded hero, clear value proposition, and structured conversion flow. Added meta descriptions, Open Graph tags for social sharing, and mobile-first responsive design.
Before
After
Static PDF pricing replaced with interactive embedded package cards, client testimonials, and direct booking CTA. Added LocalBusiness schema markup for search visibility.
Before
After
Generic contact page rebuilt with structured FAQ accordion using FAQPage schema markup, professional hero imagery, and streamlined UX. Improved heading hierarchy for SEO crawlability.
Visit PumpinSpiceDecor.com
